1894920.name: Voice over
1894920.description:
Thomas is a young millionaire who gained fame and all his money thanks to the foundation of the Quest rooms network. He has all the attributes of a successful life: wealth, influence, favorite job. However, Thomas does not feel the colors of life, he is overcome by severe depression and psychological horror, money is just pieces of paper for him, success costs nothing. But soon he will have to feel a lot of new emotions, because he is the main suspect in the case of a maniac who kills according to the scenarios of "quest rooms". Whodunit?

"Voice over" is a dark mystery narrative-driven visual novel about a murderer that clearly demonstrates to its viewer the severity and ambiguity of mental problems. The choice-based plot is a metaphor for bipolar disorder mind games, where wealth and luxury are a phase of mania, grandeur and contentment. And the main character himself has absorbed a phase of depression, frustration and detachment from the world. Also, this branching narrative story-rich novel is not devoid of a detective element, the viewer will have to solve the mystery and decide which of the characters can be trusted.

— Catchy detective interactive story with interactive elements and scary crimes.

— Well-developed characters of the characters.

— Experiences of a person subject to mental disorders.

— Inspired by Without a Dawn, Milk inside a bag of milk and Tiny Bunny.

— An oppressive creepy atmosphere and multiple endings.

— Secrets and riddles with psychological thriller.

— Unexpected plot twists.

All this is "Voice over".
